text: In applying the provisions of Section 13800 the department shall give due consideration to the amount of use or mileage traveled in the operation of a motor vehicle.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 3. Investigation and Hearing [13800 - 14401]
#### Article 1. Investigation and Re-examination [13800 - 13802]
##### § 13802

In applying the provisions of Section 13800 the department shall give due consideration to the amount of use or mileage traveled in the operation of a motor vehicle.

*(Amended by Stats. 1961, Ch. 1615.)*

subsections.text: In applying the provisions of Section 13800 the department shall give due consideration to the amount of use or mileage traveled in the operation of a motor vehicle.
